title: lotononis sparsiflora
intro: Lotononis sparsiflora is a plant species native to South Africa, also known as "tree of heaven" or "lotononis", which belongs to the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lotononis sparsiflora include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Lotononis sparsiflora include decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
